features: Clinically proven to eliminate bad breath instantly, and last for 12 hours
UltraDEX doesn’t just mask the odour, it eliminates the root cause of it
Protects teeth & gums by removing harmful bacteria
Restores natural teeth whiteness by gently lifting everyday stains
Free from alcohol and chlorhexidine; safe for long-term daily use
description: Product Description The advanced iQ+ ActiveOxi Technology within UltraDEX is clinically proven to eliminate bad breath compounds instantly, and is proven effective for 12 hours. Rinsing with UltraDEX provides instant fresh breath confidence, protects teeth & gums by removing harmful bacteria and restores natural teeth whiteness by gently lifting everyday stains. UltraDEX is free from alcohol and chlorhexidine and is safe for long term daily use by all the family (suitable for children aged 6+). Suitable for vegans - registered with the Vegan Society. UltraDEX Daily Oral Rinse is unflavoured. To experience a mint flavour simply add the contents of the enclosed sachet to the entire bottle of rinse, and shake before each use.Developed, used and recommended by Dental Professionals for over 25 years, UltraDEX is supported by several clinical studies. UltraDEX doesn’t just mask the odour of bad breath, it instantly eliminates the root cause of it. Ingredients Aqua, Trisodium Phosphate, Sodium Monoflourophosphate,Citric Acid, Sodium Chlorite, Sodium Bicarbonate Contains Sodium Monofluorophosphate (230 ppm Fluoride) Directions Use after brushing, swish around in mouth for 30 seconds to a minute, then spit out. Safety Warning Do not swallow. If used, the sachet must be added to the full bottle of rinse and mixed well before use. Keep sachet out of reach of children. Not suitable for chcildren 6 years and under. Do not store in direct sunlight. See more
